evidence.snippet: Performance powered by silicon anode lithium-ion batteries

##### Drones
Our batteries significantly enhance the flight endurance and payload capacity of drones, allowing for longer missions and more efficient data collection or delivery operations.

items.notes: Silicon anode lithium-ion battery cells for drones and HAPS; explicitly markets to unmanned aviation sector

evidence.snippet: Nokia Drone Networks Integrates Amprius SiCore® Batteries to Advance High-Reliability Operations
Amprius Secures Repeat $35 Million Purchase Order from Leading UAS Manufacturer

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells silicon anode battery cells to drone manufacturers and operators; Nokia Drone Networks and a leading UAS manufacturer ($35M repeat PO) are named customers

evidence.snippet: Nokia Drone Networks Integrates Amprius SiCore® Batteries to Advance High-Reliability Operations

products.notes: SiCore® confirmed as primary named product line; SiMaxx appears as a seed URL in the crawl but the page failed to load, so that product cannot be confirmed

evidence.snippet:
Amprius is hard at work to meet the demands of NDAA compliance.
In fact, we are well ahead of schedule.

Beginning in Spring 2026, Amprius expects to offer customers NDAA-compliant battery production pathways, including final assembly performed outside any designated “FEOC.” At the same time, the company will continue to manufacture batteries in China for customers and applications where NDAA compliance is not required, reflecting a pragmatic, global manufacturing strategy rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.

ndaa.notes: Site has a dedicated NDAA compliance blog post (Feb 2026) discussing progress toward compliance; claims to be 'well ahead of schedule' and 'expects to offer customers NDAA-compliant battery production pathways' starting Spring 2026. No explicit current compliance assertion; framed as forward-looking.

blue_uas.notes: No mention of Blue UAS / Blue sUAS anywhere in the corpus

evidence.snippet: With our MWh-scale manufacturing site in Fremont and GWh-scale partnerships in China — soon expanding across Asia and Europe — we’re ready to meet the growing demand from leading industries.
Launched MWh scale expansion and GWh-scale contract manufacturing partnerships.

readiness.notes: MWh-scale manufacturing in Fremont CA; GWh-scale contract manufacturing partnerships; $35M repeat purchase order from leading UAS manufacturer; ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100:2016 certified

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed; GWh-scale China manufacturing partnerships may affect eligibility
Blue UAS cleared list status unknown
SiMaxx product line hinted at by crawl seed URL but page failed to load — existence unconfirmed

tagline: Silicon-anode lithium-ion battery cells (SiCore™, SiMaxx™) for high-energy-density applications in unmanned and manned aviation, electric vehicles, and robotics. In production at Fremont facility with GWh-scale partnerships in Asia. Documented customers include Nokia Drone Networks and BAE Systems; received $35M repeat order from unnamed UAS manufacturer. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense-sector adoption exists but is limited.
